steps.title: Identify the main idea
steps.content: The passage uses Cunningham as one example of "the rich history of Black journalism" and notes the National Association of Black Journalists "preserves" that history. The main idea links these two ideas.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C captures both: Black journalism has an important history, and the NABJ helps honor it.
  • A misstates focus (other countries)
  • B is just a supporting detail
  • D adds an unsupported claim about "outside the United States
."

That matches choice C — C is correct.
